MAILING YOUR LAUNCH LIST
Module 4
Your Launch List
• Put your Prelaunch Content behind an opt-in
form (squeeze page)
• People opt in to receive your launch emails
• THEN you start your full launch email sequence
Planning your launch email sequence
• You want to plan out and write (ahead of time)
your launch email sequence
• There’s a lot that’s going to happen in your
launch
• Ideally, this is one area you can get ahead
• You’ll still probably tweak your emails and
make changes during the launch
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 7 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Planning your launch email sequence
• We use a Google Doc to organize our launch
emails
• Allows you to collaborate with others
• Organizing it like this works well
Planning your launch email sequence
• Your Prelaunch sequence may have anywhere
from 4-9 (or more) emails
• (Not including Open Cart – this is just
Prelaunch)
Planning your launch email sequence
• Include a strategy to mail to unopens
• Different email programs are different…
• Generally there’s a way to tag who opens your
emails and clicks through to the Prelaunch
Content so you can exclude them from a
second mailing
• Most people won’t open your email
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 7 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
Planning your prelaunch email sequence
• If they didn’t open your email, they didn’t vote for
your subject line
• Change the subject line
• If they opened but didn’t click, they voted against
your copy
• Change some of the copy in your email
Mapping out your launch emails…
